title: No Splashes Texts
description: Removes the annoying splashes text from the main menu
body:
Removes the annoying splashes text from the main menu.
**In order for the pack to fulfill its purpose, the entire game must be restarted with the resource pack loaded in advance.**

![comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/144a6fa45e93c9167ef75edb819d72e8c0531695.png)
